defect: aluminum on device not rated CO/ALR
prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: You are on a manufacturing or assembly floor running standard work with quality gates. The work under review is Conductor selection & sizing, part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: aluminum on device not rated CO/ALR. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: NEC 310, Table 310.16. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: Measurement check: Conductor selection & sizing (production floor)
